message:
chore(deps): bump frankensearch pin 048d5fa8 -> db7530e5; disable sibling-path override

Picks up the frankensearch commit db7530e5 (landed earlier in this
session) which added
`CassTantivyIndex::open_or_create_with_writer_parallelism(path, n)`
and eliminated the intermediate Vec allocation in par_chunks doc
batching. cass's staged shard build path already calls
`TantivyIndex::open_or_create_with_writer_parallelism` through its
wrapper crate, so the pin bump unblocks that call site on
downstream consumers building against crates.io rather than a
sibling checkout.

Also comments out the `[patch."https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch"]`
sibling-path override block. The override was pointing at
../frankensearch/crates/* so that local edits in the frankensearch
tree would flow into cass builds without a rev bump; now that the
symbol is merged to frankensearch's main and the pin has advanced
to include it, the sibling override is no longer needed. Leaving
the block commented-out rather than deleted so the next time we
do a sibling-path iteration we can just uncomment it.

Touched:
- Cargo.toml: rev bump + commented-out patch block
- Cargo.lock: corresponding revision update
- build.rs: expected_rev in the CONTRACTS table (the build-time
  guard that refuses to build if the manifest drifts from the
  frozen dependency set)
- README.md: the dependency-matrix table in the installer docs
